IDENTITY: Candidate Profile (36856210.pdf)
SUMMARY: Dedicated Information Assurance Professional well-versed in analyzing and mitigating risk. Excels at boosting performance and productivity by establishing realistic goals and enforcing deadlines.
SKILLS: Enterprise platforms, Product Lifecycle Management (PLM), Project tracking, Hardware and software upgrade planning, Product requirements documentation, Active Directory design and deployment, Workstation build and deployment, Systems Accreditation Packages, Red Hat Enterprise Linux installation and hardening, Network Design & Troubleshooting, High Performance Computing, Information Assurance, Risk Management Framework (RMF), Data storage engineering, Active Directory layout, Information Technology, Red Hat Enterprise Linux servers, MS Windows servers, MS Windows desktop, Architectural diagrams, Accreditation boundaries, Risk management, Enterprise strategies, Vendor relations, Desktop publishing software: Photoshop, Illustrator, HTML, Team work, Collaboration
